sentence: If a 'snomed' reference to 'Asthma' is true, then 'at_AllergyOnset' is mandatory.
In the breast_cancer workflow, any medication order must be cross-referenced against the 'Inhaled steroid therapy' SNOMED hierarchy.
If the 'clinicalCode' in 'Allergy_Panel' is a 'snomed' reference 'SCTID: 252325008', then the actor must be a 'Practitioner' with specialization in 'Gynecology service'.
If 'Potential_COPD_Smoker' is identified, the next state must include a 'Snomed' code related to 'Smoking cessation therapy'.
Every 'at_AllergyOnset' event must be linked to a 'Snomed' concept representing a clinical manifestation (e.g., 'Atopic dermatitis').
If 'Drug_Allergy_Incidence_Submodule' is active, any 'at_MedicationOrder' must contain a valid SNOMED hierarchy code for 'Administration of intravenous fluids'.
A trace cannot contain a 'Snomed' for 'Malignant neoplasm of breast' if the 'Allergist_Guard' recorded a 'False' outcome.
Ensure that when an Epipen is prescribed, the system validates the clinical nature via 'Snomed' reference to 'Allergic disposition'.
Whenever 'Administer_Allergy_Test' is executed, it must eventually be followed by a 'Snomed' finding of either 'Asthma screening' or 'Allergy screening test'.
If 'Allergy_Unspecified' occurs, the event must contain a 'Snomed' reference to the concept 'Contact dermatitis'.
Si se realiza un Administer_Allergy_Test (x), el siguiente evento Allergy_Panel (y) debe ser ejecutado por el mismo actor que realizó la prueba inicial.
Si ocurre una Allergist_Initial_Visit (x), el evento End_Allergist_Initial_Visit (y) debe cumplir que y[Timestamp] - x[Timestamp] < 3600.
Si se inicia el Drug_Allergy_Incidence_Submodule (x), la actividad General_Allergy_CarePlan (y) debe ocurrir exactamente en la posición x[#] + 3.
Tras el evento Initial (x), cualquier at_Procedure (y) posterior debe tener un x[Timestamp] < y[Timestamp].
Si un Physician realiza la Allergist_Initial_Visit (x), todos los eventos at_MedicationOrder (y) posteriores deben ser realizados por ese mismo actor.
Si ocurren Environmental_Allergy_Incidence_Submodule (x) y Food_Allergy_Incidence_Submodule (y), el timestamp de x debe ser menor al de y.
Si un Practitioner inicia un at_Encounter (x), el evento at_Terminal (y) de esa traza debe tener un actor diferente al del inicio.
Si se registra el estado Atopic (x), el evento Prescribe_OTC_Antihistamine (y) debe ocurrir antes de que la posición sea y[#] > x[#] + 10.
Si el Clinical_System ejecuta una at_Guard (x), el siguiente evento at_Delay (y) debe ser gestionado por el mismo actor.
Ninguna actividad de Immunotherapy_Submodule (y) puede tener una posición y[#] menor a la posición del evento Allergy_Panel (x).
Always, if 'at_AllergyOnset' happens, the patient must be 'Atopic' within 7200 seconds or the care plan is void.
After 'Allergist_Initial_Visit' starts, the patient must remain in the 'Encouter' state until 'at_EncounterEnd' is explicitly called.
If 'Prescribe_Epipen' occurs, it must be the case that 'Administer_Allergy_Test' happened at least once since the last 'Initial' event.
It is globally true that 'Delay_For_Atopy' cannot be followed by 'Not_Atopic' in the immediate next state.
Once 'Living_With_Allergies' becomes true, it must stay true until 'Terminal' happens (No recovery path).
If 'Delay_For_Allergist_Initial_Visit' happens, 'Allergist_Initial_Visit' must occur eventually, but not before 86400 seconds (24h).
'Initial' must be the first event (x) such that there is no previous event (Y false).
If 'Immunotherapy_Submodule' is called, it must be preceded by 'Allergy_Panel' within a window of exactly 30 days (2592000s).
If 'Potential_COPD_Nonsmoker' occurs, then 'Potential_COPD_Smoker' must never have happened in the past for this trace.
Every 'at_Simple' recording (vital signs) must be followed by another 'at_Simple' within 14400 seconds, unless 'Terminal' is reached.
Always, if the onset of the allergy happens, the patient must be atopic within 7200 seconds or the care plan is void.
After the initial visit with the allergist starts, the patient must remain in the encounter state until the end of the encounter is explicitly called.
If the prescription of an Epipen occurs, it must be the case that the administration of an allergy test happened at least once since the last initial event.
It is globally true that the delay for atopy cannot be followed by being non-atopic in the immediate next state.
Once living with allergies becomes true, it must stay true until the terminal event happens (No recovery path).
If the delay for the initial allergist visit happens, the initial visit with the allergist must occur eventually, but not before 86400 seconds (24h).
The initial event must be the first event such that there is no previous event.
If the immunotherapy submodule is called, it must be preceded by the allergy panel within a window of exactly 30 days (2592000s).
If a potential COPD case in a non-smoker occurs, then a potential COPD case in a smoker must never have happened in the past for this trace.
Every simple recording of vital signs must be followed by another simple recording of vital signs within 14400 seconds, unless the terminal state is reached.
If 'Allergist_Guard' is false, the 'allergies' workflow must jump directly to 'General_Allergy_CarePlan' in the next state.
Only a 'Pharmacist' can execute an event with 'at_ActionType = at_MedicationOrder'.
A 'Radiologist' must not participate in any 'Allergy_Unspecified' related activities.
Eventually, the Clinical System will trigger the Age_Guard, and in the very next state, a guard-type action (at_Guard) will be executed.
The 'copd' workflow must always contain a 'Potential_COPD_Smoker' or 'Potential_COPD_Nonsmoker' activity before 'Terminal'.
If 'at_CallSubmodule' is called for 'Drug_Allergy', then 'at_CarePlanStart' must not happen in the next 3 states.
formula: G ((at_CallSubmodule & Drug_Allergy_Incidence_Submodule) -> !(X at_CarePlanStart | X X at_CarePlanStart | X X X at_CarePlanStart))

sentence: 'End_Allergist_Initial_Visit' must be performed by the same 'Physician' who started the visit.
formula: G ((Allergist_Initial_Visit & at_Initial) -> x.(F (End_Allergist_Initial_Visit & y.("(x,y)x[Actor] == y[Actor] and x[Actor] == 'Physician'"))))

sentence: In 'fibromyalgia' workflow, 'Initial' must be followed by at least three 'at_Simple' events before any diagnosis.
If 'Care_Manager' is the actor, the activity must be 'General_Allergy_CarePlan' or 'Delay_For_Atopy'.
Any 'at_Procedure' must be authorized by a 'Practitioner' and not by the 'Clinical_System'.
If the guard for the allergist is false, the allergies workflow must jump directly to the general allergy care plan in the next state.
Only a pharmacist can execute an event related to a medication order.
A radiologist must not participate in any activities related to unspecified allergies.
Eventually, the Clinical System will trigger the Age_Guard, and in the very next state, a guard-type action (at_Guard) will be executed.
The COPD workflow must always contain either a potential COPD case in a smoker or a potential COPD case in a non-smoker before reaching the terminal state.
If a submodule is called for a drug allergy, then the start of a care plan must not happen in the next three states.
formula: G (at_CallSubmodule & Drug_Allergy_Incidence_Submodule -> (! X at_CarePlanStart & ! X X at_CarePlanStart & ! X X X at_CarePlanStart))

sentence: The end of the initial allergist visit must be performed by the same physician who started the visit.
In the fibromyalgia workflow, the initial event must be followed by at least three simple recordings before any diagnosis occurs.
If a care manager is the actor, the activity must be the general allergy care plan or a delay for atopy.
Any procedure must be authorized by a practitioner and not by the clinical system.
Si el historial clínico supera los 100 registros, la traza se considera saturada y debe finalizarse obligatoriamente en un máximo de 5 eventos.
formula: G (x.("(x)x[#] > 100") -> (F Terminal & !X X X X X X Terminal))

sentence: Si se registra una duración negativa en un retardo, el sistema debe saltar al estado de cierre y marcar un error de integridad en los datos.
Si un paciente presenta Chronic obstructive bronchitis, debe haber ocurrido en el pasado un Potential_COPD_Smoker y el actor actual debe ser un Physician.
Si se ejecuta el procedimiento de "Administrar Prueba de Alergia", el sistema debe invocar obligatoriamente el submódulo de "Panel de Alergias" en el siguiente paso clínico.
Todo evento marcado con el tipo de estado Encounter debe estar seguido eventualmente por un evento de tipo EncounterEnd antes de que la traza pueda finalizar.

Si el sistema registra una guarda (Guard) con la condición de atributo visit_allergist, el siguiente evento no puede ser directamente un cierre de proceso; debe existir al menos un procedimiento intermedio.
Si tras el evento inicial no se registra ninguna otra actividad, el propio sistema clínico debe ejecutar el cierre del proceso.

Si se identifica un Malignant neoplasm of colon (Neoplasia maligna de colon), es obligatorio que eventualmente se realice un Colonoscopy (Colonoscopia) y se registre un Cancer care plan (Plan de cuidados de cáncer).

En las trazas de flujo de "Cáncer de Mama", es obligatorio que tras el evento inicial se ejecute el procedimiento de validación de sexo "Female" antes de cualquier snomed intervención quirúrgica o snomed tratamiento.
Dentro del flujo de trabajo de dermatitis, la actividad de prescribir Epipen está estrictamente prohibida.
